name: Studio Golf
about: Studio Golf is a 24/7 members-only golf simulator facility located in Montgomery, Indiana. It utilizes TrackMan 4 technology, the same system used by professional PGA golfers, to provide players with pro-level tracking, shot analytics, and access to virtual golf courses. The venue offers a flexible pricing model, including monthly memberships, seasonal passes, and pay-as-you-go options, allowing players to book sessions in advance and use the facility at their convenience.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to the same professional-grade TrackMan 4 technology used by PGA Tour players
Convenient 24/7 access with easy session scheduling via an app
The ability to play on over 500 renowned virtual courses like Pebble Beach and St Andrews

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service provided.
No mention of alcohol service. BYOB policy is not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Uses dual radar and one camera for pro-level shot tracking and data analysis.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience, but a contact inquiry would be needed for confirmation.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a policy regarding outside food and drinks. The venue does not list on-site dining or bar services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full round of golf on the simulator takes approximately 1 hour per player.

faq.question: Is Studio Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically market to or mention accommodations for children, suggesting the primary focus is on adult golfers.
